testcase.name: API Contract: Schema Constants > VALID_ROLES > should contain expected roles
API Contract: Schema Constants > VALID_ROLES > should have exactly 3 roles
API Contract: Schema Constants > VALID_FEATURE_KEYS > should contain expected feature keys
API Contract: Schema Constants > VALID_FEATURE_KEYS > should have exactly 6 feature keys
API Contract: Sketch Endpoint > POST /api/sketches - Request Schema > should accept minimal valid sketch
API Contract: Sketch Endpoint > POST /api/sketches - Request Schema > should accept full valid sketch
API Contract: Sketch Endpoint > POST /api/sketches - Request Schema > should enforce node structure
API Contract: Sketch Endpoint > POST /api/sketches - Request Schema > should enforce edge structure
API Contract: Sketch Endpoint > POST /api/sketches - Request Schema > should enforce size limits
API Contract: Organization Endpoint > POST /api/organizations - Request Schema > should require name field
API Contract: Organization Endpoint > POST /api/organizations - Request Schema > should accept valid organization
API Contract: Organization Endpoint > POST /api/organizations - Request Schema > should reject empty name
API Contract: Features Endpoint > PUT /api/features - Request Schema > should accept valid features update
API Contract: Features Endpoint > PUT /api/features - Request Schema > should reject unknown feature keys
API Contract: Features Endpoint > PUT /api/features - Request Schema > should reject non-boolean values
API Contract: Users Endpoint > PUT /api/users/:id - Request Schema > should accept valid role update
API Contract: Users Endpoint > PUT /api/users/:id - Request Schema > should accept valid organization assignment
API Contract: Users Endpoint > PUT /api/users/:id - Request Schema > should reject invalid role
API Contract: Users Endpoint > PUT /api/users/:id - Request Schema > should reject invalid UUID for organizationId
API Contract: Response Schemas > should document sketch response structure
API Contract: Response Schemas > should document error response structure
API Contract: Response Schemas > should document list response structure
Sketches API Integration Tests > GET /api/sketches > should return 401 if unauthorized
Sketches API Integration Tests > GET /api/sketches > should return sketches for authenticated user
testcase.system-out:
[API /api/sketches] GET request started
[API /api/sketches] User test_user_integration_1770293909596 fetched 1 own sketches

testcase.name: Sketches API Integration Tests > GET /api/sketches > should not return sketches of other users
testcase.system-out:
[API /api/sketches] GET request started
[API /api/sketches] User test_user_other_1770293909596 fetched 0 own sketches

testcase.name: Sketches API Integration Tests > POST /api/sketches > should create a new sketch
testcase.system-out:
[API /api/sketches] POST request started
[API /api/sketches] Created sketch 60f36078-46d8-4e7c-a774-b0060ec205fe for test_user_integration_1770293909596 in project none

testcase.name: Sketches API Integration Tests > POST /api/sketches > should return 400 for invalid data
testcase.system-err: [API /api/sketches] Validation failed: [ 'name must be a string or null' ] [API /api/sketches] Request body summary: { name: 123, nameType: 'number', nodesCount: 'not array', edgesCount: 'not array', adminConfigType: 'undefined', creationDateType: 'undefined', projectId: undefined }

testcase.name: Sketches API Integration Tests > PUT /api/sketches/[id] > should update an existing sketch
Sketches API Integration Tests > PUT /api/sketches/[id] > should return 404 when updating non-existent sketch
Sketches API Integration Tests > PUT /api/sketches/[id] > should not allow updating other users sketch
Sketches API Integration Tests > DELETE /api/sketches/[id] > should delete a sketch
Sketches API Integration Tests > DELETE /api/sketches/[id] > should return 404 when deleting non-existent sketch
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should return null for valid sketch data
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should return null for minimal valid sketch
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should return null for sketch with dangling edges
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should reject non-string name
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should reject non-array nodes
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should reject nodes without numeric coordinates
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should reject nodes without id
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should reject edges that have neither tail nor head
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should reject oversized node array
Validators Unit Tests > validateSketchInput > should reject non-object adminConfig
Validators Unit Tests > validateUUID > should return true for valid UUID
Validators Unit Tests > validateUUID > should return false for invalid UUID format
